reasoning: Let's investigate the relationship between I and V. Increasing I might reveal a pattern. I will increase I.
I have increased I and V has also increased. Let's try decreasing I to see if it affects V differently.
I have decreased I and V has returned to its original value. Now, let's increase R to see its effect on V.

I have observed that when I is 2.0 and R is 10.0, V is 40.0. When I is increased to 3.0 and R remains 10.0, V becomes 30.0. When I is decreased back to 2.0 and R is increased to 20.0, V returns to 40.0. This suggests a direct relationship between R and V.
